heading: Office of General Counsel
label: 3421 Office of General Counsel
text: There shall be in the Department an Office of General Counsel, to be administered by the General Counsel appointed under . The General Counsel shall provide legal assistance to the Secretary concerning the programs and policies of the Department.section 3412(b) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 209 and is classified to .section 210 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3420 of this title
